q1:
Tier 1 - IMMEDIATE FOCUS:

1. Financial Services (highest regulatory pressure + largest deal sizes)
2. Government (FedRAMP advantage + long contract cycles = high LTV)
3. Insurance (proven use case: underwriting automation showing strong ROI)

Tier 2 - EXPAND:

4. Healthcare (compliance-driven, growing digital transformation budgets)
5. Manufacturing (high volume potential, supply chain focus)
